name: ask-surfaces
title: Ask surfaces
description: Contextual AI surfaces: inline popover, right-edge pane, command entry, launcher.
prompt: Use the Meridian MD design system. Import Ask surfaces from @/primitives/Ask. Add contextual AI help with Inline and right-edge push pane only. Every assistant answer needs a source line. Do not add a floating chatbot, third panel, or accent-colored inline trigger.
